name: MouseStats
description: Budget-friendly session playback, heatmap, form analytics and survey tool for websites.

seo.title: MouseStats — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: MouseStats: Budget-friendly session playback, heatmap, form analytics and survey tool for websites.

when_to_use: Session recording to replay user navigation on any page
Heatmaps showing where users click and scroll
Form analytics detecting which fields cause friction
Survey popups triggered by user exit intent

pros: Cheaper than most competitors for basic replay and heatmaps
Simple setup for small marketing sites
Predictable pricing at low traffic volumes
cons: Feature set is clearly a generation behind Hotjar/FullStory
Dated UI and slower replay player
Limited integrations and no modern API
Thin mobile support and no AI tooling
review.verdict: Bargain-bin heatmap tool that works for small sites, but you'll outgrow it the moment you get serious about CRO.
review.best_for: Small business sites that need cheap heatmaps and form analytics.
review.not_for: Growing product teams that expect modern UX and integrations.
